notes: XY4 Phantom Forces, 10-card XY-era pack. Confirmed via multiple retailer listings (DA Card World, ToyWiz, Amazon) + Bulbapedia: 36 packs/box, 10 cards/pack; modeled hit slots = 1 rare-or-better + 1 reverse-holo (3 uncommon + 5 common + basic energy not modeled). Per-pack rates come from Flipside Gaming's community rarity analysis (the only fetchable source with numeric XY-era rates): EX ~1:6 packs, ultra-rare/full-art ~1:12, secret-rare 1:72. Critically, pokemontcg.io's xy4 buckets have NO separate EX bucket — Pokemon-EX and Full Arts both fall under 'ultra-rare'; M-EX/Dialga-EX gold/rainbow versions are 'secret-rare'. So rare-slot ultra-rare = EX(0.167)+FullArt(0.083) summed = 0.25; secret-rare = 1:72 = 0.0139; remaining 0.7361 split rare(non-holo) vs rare-holo using the set's 19 rare / 14 rare-holo pool and XY-era ~1:3 holo cadence → rare-holo 0.30, rare 0.4361. Retailer 'per box ~15 ultra / 3 secret' figures conflate rare-holos+EX+FA and are not used as the rate anchor (per-pack documented rates preferred). confidence=low: no Phantom-Forces-specific opening study found; rates are XY-era averages applied to this set. Reverse-holo slot mapped proportionally across the 104-card reverse-eligible pool (common 34 / uncommon 37 / rare 19 / rare-holo 14) since there is no dedicated reverse bucket. Vintage sealed box carries large collector premium so EV/pack will sit well below box price — expected, not compensated for. No BREAK cards in XY4 (BREAK debuted next set, BREAKthrough).
